file.content:
{
  "name": "agent-deck",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "通用 Coding Agent 驾驶舱",
  "main": "build/main/index.js",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "predev": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "prebuild": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "build": "electron-vite build",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",
    "predist": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "dist": "electron-vite build && electron-builder",
    "predist:mac": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "dist:mac": "electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac",
    "predist:win": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "dist:win": "electron-vite build && electron-builder --win",
    "predist:linux": "node scripts/sync-codex-skills.mjs",
    "dist:linux": "electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux",
    "icon:gen": "node scripts/gen-icon-ico.mjs",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "test:fts5": "scripts/verify-fts5.sh",
    "logger:check": "bash scripts/logger-check.sh",
    "postinstall": "electron-builder install-app-deps"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk": "^0.3.144",
    "@anthropic-ai/sdk": "^0.96.0",
    "@electron-toolkit/preload": "^3.0.1",
    "@electron-toolkit/utils": "^3.0.0",
    "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "1.29.0",
    "@monaco-editor/react": "^4.7.0",
    "@openai/codex-sdk": "^0.131.0",
    "better-sqlite3": "^11.7.0",
    "electron-log": "^5.4.4",
    "electron-store": "8.2.0",
    "fastify": "^5.0.0",
    "proper-lockfile": "^4.1.2",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "react-markdown": "^10.1.0",
    "react-syntax-highlighter": "^16.1.1",
    "refractor": "^5.0.0",
    "remark-gfm": "^4.0.1",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@electron-toolkit/tsconfig": "^1.0.1",
    "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.0.0",
    "@types/better-sqlite3": "^7.6.0",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/proper-lockfile": "^4.1.4",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.5.13",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.0",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.0",
    "electron": "^33.0.0",
    "electron-builder": "^25.0.0",
    "electron-vite": "^2.3.0",
    "png-to-ico": "^3.0.1",
    "postcss": "^8.4.0",
    "tailwindcss": "^4.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.6.0",
    "vite": "^5.4.0",
    "vitest": "^2.1.9"
  },
  "build": {
    "appId": "com.agentdeck.app",
    "productName": "Agent Deck",
    "directories": {
      "output": "build/dist",
      "buildResources": "resources"
    },
    "files": [
      "build/**/*",
      "!build/dist/**",
      "resources/**/*"
    ],
    "extraResources": [
      {
        "from": "resources/bin",
        "to": "bin",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      },
      {
        "from": "resources/claude-config",
        "to": "claude-config",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      },
      {
        "from": "resources/codex-config",
        "to": "codex-config",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      },
      {
        "from": "resources/sounds",
        "to": "sounds",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      },
      {
        "from": "resources/SOPs",
        "to": "SOPs",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      },
      {
        "from": "resources/templates",
        "to": "templates",
        "filter": [
          "**/*"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "asarUnpack": [
      "node_modules/@openai/codex/**/*",
      "node_modules/@openai/codex-darwin-*/**/*",
      "node_modules/@openai/codex-linux-*/**/*",
      "node_modules/@openai/codex-win32-*/**/*",
      "node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-darwin-*/**/*",
      "node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-linux-*/**/*",
      "node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-win32-*/**/*"
    ],
    "mac": {
      "target": "dmg",
      "icon": "resources/icon.png",
      "category": "public.app-category.developer-tools"
    },
    "win": {
      "target": [
        "nsis",
        "portable"
      ],
      "icon": "resources/icon.ico",
      "artifactName": "${productName}-${version}-${arch}.${ext}"
    },
    "nsis": {
      "oneClick": false,
      "perMachine": false,
      "allowToChangeInstallationDirectory": true,
      "deleteAppDataOnUninstall": false,
      "shortcutName": "Agent Deck"
    },
    "linux": {
      "target": [
        "AppImage"
      ],
      "icon": "resources/icon.png",
      "category": "Development"
    }
  }
}

content.thinking:
我需要分析这个项目的 package.json 和 tsconfig.node.json 文件，对比它们的技术栈配置，评估依赖管理是否规范，然后提供详细的改进建议。

这是一个名为 agent-deck 的 Electron 应用，用于通用编码 Agent 驾驶舱。项目使用 electron-vite 进行开发和构建，electron-builder 用于打包桌面应用，并通过 postinstall 钩子重新编译原生依赖如 better-sqlite3。核心依赖包括 Claude Agent SDK、OpenAI Codex SDK、MCP SDK、Monaco Editor、React 19、Fastify 5 以及 electron-store 8.2.0（故意固定版本以保持 CommonJS 兼容性，因为 v9+ 是 ESM 专用）。

开发工具链包括 TypeScript 5.6、Vite 5.4、Vitest 2.1.9、Tailwind CSS 4 和 Electron 33，并配置了两个 TypeScript 配置文件分别用于主进程和渲染进程的类型检查。

现在我来分析这个项目的技术栈和依赖管理情况，这是一个典型的 Electron-Vite 项目，包含桌面应用、React 前端、本地 SQLite 数据库、Fastify 后端服务器，以及 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 的 AI 集成能力。

依赖管理方面有几个值得注意的地方：好的实践包括正确分离 dependencies 和 devDependencies、所有类型定义都在开发依赖中、postinstall 脚本处理原生模块重建、以及为原生二进制文件配置 asarUnpack。关键的依赖项被精心固定版本（比如 @modelcontextprotocol/sdk 和 electron-store），这是因为它们在主版本间有破坏性变更。

不过还有几个需要检查的地方：首先是是否存在 lockfile（package-lock.json、pnpm-lock.yaml 或 yarn.lock），这对规范的依赖管理至关重要；其次 package.json 缺少 engines 字段来指定 Node 版本要求，考虑到项目使用了原生模块和 ESM 脚本，这会很有帮助；第三是版本策略混合使用了 caret 和精确固定，虽然这个模式合理，但应该文档化说明为什么要这样做。

对于 0.x 版本的 SDK（比如 @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk ^0.3.144 和 @openai/codex-sdk ^0.131.0），caret 范围的行为需要特别注意——它们会允许在同一个 minor 版本内的补丁更新，但对于快速迭代的 AI SDK 来说，即使是补丁版本也可能引入破坏性变更，所以 lockfile 的存在就更加关键了。另外项目同时依赖 @anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.96.0 和 @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk ^0.3.144，agent SDK 很可能依赖基础 SDK，这种依赖关系需要验证。

react-syntax-highlighter 的类型版本（@types/react-syntax-highlighter ^15.5.13）与运行时版本（^16.1.1）存在主版本号不匹配，这可能导致类型定义与实际 API 不符。Tailwind CSS 4 引入了新的 @tailwindcss/postcss，但项目仍然列出了 autoprefixer 和 postcss，在 Tailwind 4 中这些可能是冗余的，因为 Lightning CSS 已经处理了浏览器前缀。项目中没有显式的 resolutions 或 overrides 字段，对于多个 AI SDK 可能共享的传递依赖（比如不同的 zod 版本），这可能会成为问题。

electron-vite 2.3.0 与 Vite 5 兼容，vitest 2.1.9 也与 Vite 5 兼容。项目使用多个 tsconfig 文件，其中 tsconfig.node.json 设置了 composite:true，这表明使用了项目引用，这是个好的实践。electron-store 被固定在 8.2.0，这是正确的选择，因为 9+ 版本是纯 ESM，而主进程是 CommonJS 格式，但这个决定没有文档说明。

为了更全面地评估依赖管理是否规范，我需要检查锁文件、.nvmrc、.npmrc、tsconfig 文件和 electron.vite.config 来理解输出格式，但用户只要求我分析两个特定文件。

不过，要真正评估依赖管理是否"规范"，最关键的信号是锁文件的存在和使用的包管理器，其次是被引用的 tsconfig 文件是否存在。让我快速检查这些关键信息。

content.text: 两个文件已读取。在给出结论前，我需要确认几个对"依赖管理是否规范"最关键的信号——锁文件、包管理器、以及 typecheck 脚本里引用的其它 tsconfig 是否存在。

content.thinking: I'm seeing that pnpm is the package manager with a committed lockfile, and there are multiple TypeScript config files at the root including the electron.vite config. Let me check the .npmrc and TypeScript configurations to get the full picture.

content.text: 锁文件是 `pnpm-lock.yaml`（pnpm 项目，已提交），根目录三个 tsconfig 齐全。再读 `.npmrc` 和根 `tsconfig.json`、`tsconfig.web.json`——pnpm + Electron + 原生模块的组合里，`.npmrc` 的 hoist 配置往往是成败关键。

content.thinking:
I'm recognizing this is a single analysis task rather than something requiring multiple steps, so I can complete it all at once. Looking at the project setup, it's using pnpm as the package manager with a committed lock file, and the .npmrc configuration has auto-install-peers enabled along with side-effects handling.

The `side-effects-cache=false` setting is particularly deliberate here — it forces rebuilds of native modules like better-sqlite3, ensuring they're compiled against the correct Electron ABI rather than relying on cached builds. That's a smart choice for an Electron project with native dependencies. There's a potential consideration with pnpm's symlinked node_modules layout and electron-builder compatibility, though the fact that the project clearly builds successfully suggests it's working fine with the current setup. Now I'm moving into the TypeScript configuration structure. Let me verify the caret semantics for these 0.x versions: ^0.3.144 allows patches within 0.3.x, while ^0.96.0 and ^0.131.0 lock to their respective minor versions (0.96.x and 0.131.x only). Since the lockfile pins exact versions, reproducibility is safe as long as CI uses frozen lockfile mode. The exact pins on @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and electron-store are intentional — notably, electron-store v9+ switched to ESM-only, so staying on 8.2.0 avoids that breaking change.

Now I'm spotting type version mismatches that are concerning. The react-syntax-highlighter types (v15) lag behind the library (v16), which could cause incomplete type coverage at runtime. More critically, @types/better-sqlite3 is stuck at v7 while the actual library is at v11 — that's a significant major version gap that suggests the types are severely outdated and likely incompatible with the current API.

On the build side, Tailwind 4 switched to an internal vendor-prefixing engine, so autoprefixer is probably unnecessary carryover from an older setup. I should check if it's actually referenced in the postcss config before recommending removal.

The project's missing an `engines` field entirely, which matters here given the native module dependencies and Electron bundling Node 20. Adding `engines.node` and a `packageManager` field with the pnpm version would enable Corepack and lock the install environment for reproducibility — that's a real gap for proper dependency management. On the zod front, the lockfile shows anthropic SDK is already resolving against zod 4.3.6 without conflicts, so overrides aren't immediately necessary, though it's worth monitoring since some libraries still expect zod v3.

React 19 is fully aligned across the stack — Vite plugin, monaco-editor, react-markdown all support it. Electron 33 with Node 20 and Chromium 130 pairs well with electron-vite and electron-builder. The better-sqlite3 setup is solid: they're explicitly verifying FTS5 compilation and the postinstall hook rebuilds native modules against Electron's ABI. The asarUnpack configuration correctly handles platform-specific binaries from the AI SDK dependencies, showing thoughtful packaging.

One thing to verify: better-sqlite3 isn't explicitly listed in asarUnpack, but electron-builder should auto-detect and unpack its .node file anyway — worth confirming the packaged app loads it from asar.unpacked. The pnpm + electron-builder combo works here since the project ships builds, though historically it's been finicky with symlink dereferencing; keeping the default node-linker and testing packaged builds after dependency changes is the safe approach.

The package structure looks right — private app, early version 0.1.0, main entry pointing to the built output. The npm lifecycle hooks are well-used: pre* scripts consistently run the codex skills sync before any dev, build, or dist operation, ensuring everything stays in sync. The typecheck script runs both Node and web TypeScript configs separately rather than bundling them together. I'll quickly check the lockfile to get the exact resolved versions for react-syntax-highlighter and better-sqlite3's type packages, so I can give concrete version numbers rather than hedging.

content.text: 已掌握全貌：pnpm 项目、锁文件已提交、根 `tsconfig.json` 用 project references 串起 node/web 两个子配置，结构标准。最后核一下我准备点名的几个"类型 vs 运行时"版本错位在锁文件里的真实解析结果，避免误报。

content.thinking: I should check the lockfile structure more carefully with a broader search pattern to understand how the entries are formatted.

content.thinking:
I've confirmed the version mismatches: react-syntax-highlighter at 16.1.1 with types at 15.5.13 shows a real major version skew that needs flagging, while @types/better-sqlite3 at 7.6.13 is actually the correct current types package despite the library being at 11.x.

I'm also noting that electron-store is pinned at 8.2.0 to avoid ESM issues, and autoprefixer 10.5.0 is properly wired to postcss 8.5.10 though it may be redundant with Tailwind 4. Now I'll structure a comprehensive analysis organized by tech stack overview, dependency management assessment with what's working well versus what needs attention, and prioritized recommendations—all in Chinese since that's what the user is using. I'll keep the response thorough but organized since they asked for detailed suggestions, making sure each point is concise and actionable.

content.text:
核对完成，几个版本错位在锁文件里的真实解析结果已确认。以下是完整分析。

## 一、技术栈全景

把 `package.json`（依赖+打包）和 `tsconfig.node.json`（主进程侧编译边界）对照看，这是一个**结构清晰的 Electron 桌面应用**，按进程分层：

| 层 | 关键依赖 | tsconfig 归属 |
|---|---|---|
| **桌面外壳/构建** | electron 33、electron-vite 2.3、electron-builder 25、vite 5.4 | — |
| **主进程**（`src/main`） | fastify 5（本地服务）、better-sqlite3 11（本地库，带 FTS5）、electron-store 8、electron-log 5、proper-lockfile | `tsconfig.node.json` |
| **AI/Agent 集成**（主进程） | @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk、@anthropic-ai/sdk、@openai/codex-sdk、@modelcontextprotocol/sdk | `tsconfig.node.json` |
| **渲染层**（`src/renderer`） | react 19、react-dom 19、zustand 5、@monaco-editor/react、react-markdown 10 + remark-gfm + react-syntax-highlighter + refractor、tailwindcss 4 | `tsconfig.web.json` |
| **跨进程共享**（`src/shared`） | zod 4（校验/类型） | **同时**被 node + web 两份 tsconfig include |

**一个值得肯定的对照结论**：`tsconfig.node.json` 的 `include`（main/preload/shared）和你实际的依赖归属是吻合的——重型原生/服务端依赖（fastify、better-sqlite3）只服务主进程，渲染层是纯前端栈，`shared` 仅承载 zod 这种两端通吃的轻量校验层。进程边界 = 编译边界 = 依赖边界，三者一致，这是架构上做得对的地方。

补充确认（读了 `.npmrc`、根 `tsconfig.json`、`tsconfig.web.json`、`pnpm-lock.yaml`）：
- **包管理器 = pnpm**，`pnpm-lock.yaml` 已提交 ✓
- 根 `tsconfig.json` 用 **project references**（`files:[]` + references node/web，子配置均 `composite:true`）串接，是 electron-vite 的标准三件套写法 ✓
- `.npmrc`：`auto-install-peers=true` + `side-effects-cache=false`

---

## 二、依赖管理评估

### ✅ 规范、且看得出是内行的地方

1. **deps / devDevDeps 划分干净**：electron、构建工具、所有 `@types/*` 全在 devDependencies；运行时依赖在 dependencies。没有错位。
2. **原生模块处理到位**：`postinstall: electron-builder install-app-deps` 按 Electron ABI 重建 better-sqlite3；`.npmrc` 里 `side-effects-cache=false` 正是为带编译副作用的原生模块准备的——避免 pnpm 缓存导致 ABI 不匹配。还有 `test:fts5`/`verify-fts5.sh` 专门验证 FTS5 编译进去了。
3. **打包 `asarUnpack` 精准**：把 `@openai/codex`、`@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` 的**各平台原生二进制**从 asar 解包。这是 Electron 打包 CLI 型依赖最容易踩的坑，这里处理对了。
4. **两个"反常"的精确锁版本是刻意为之，且是对的**：
   - `electron-store: 8.2.0`（非 ^）——v9+ 是 **纯 ESM**，而 electron-vite 默认把主进程打成 CJS，`require` 不进纯 ESM 包。锁在 8.x 是正确决策。
   - `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk: 1.29.0`（非 ^）——MCP SDK 跨小版本常有 break，锁死合理。

### ⚠️ 值得注意 / 可改进

1. **缺 `engines` 和 `packageManager` 字段**（最影响"规范性"的一项）。项目有原生模块（需 node-gyp/编译器）、`.mjs` 脚本、pnpm、Electron 33（内置 Node 20）——但 `package.json` 没声明 Node 版本下限，也没用 `packageManager` 锁 pnpm 版本。新人换台机器装出来的环境是不可复现的。

2. **`@types/react-syntax-highlighter` 与运行库大版本错位（已在锁文件确认）**：运行库解析为 **16.1.1**，类型包解析为 **15.5.13**。大版本(16 vs 15)不一致，v16 的新 API 可能没有类型或类型不准。这是个**真实需要核**的点。
   - 对比说明：`@types/better-sqlite3@7.6.13` vs `better-sqlite3@11.x` 看着也错位，但这是**误报**——该类型包的版本线本来就独立维护、长期停在 7.x 并兼容 11/12，无需处理。两者要区别对待。

3. **Tailwind 4 下 `autoprefixer` 很可能冗余**：锁文件显示 `autoprefixer@10.5.0(postcss@8.5.10)` 确实接进了 postcss。但 Tailwind v4 的新引擎(Lightning CSS)已内置厂商前缀，官方 v4 配置通常**不再需要** autoprefixer/postcss-import。需要看 `postcss.config.*` 确认它是否还被引用，没用就删。

4. **pnpm × electron-builder 的兼容性需持续盯**：`.npmrc` 没设 `node-linker=hoisted`，用的是 pnpm 默认软链布局。electron-builder 历史上对软链 `node_modules` 收集生产依赖较敏感。你目前应该是能打出包的（仓库里有 dist 相关记录），但**每次改动依赖后要验证打包产物**，尤其确认 better-sqlite3 的 `.node` 落到了 `asar.unpacked`（它不在 `asarUnpack` 列表里，依赖 electron-builder 自动识别）。

5. **0.x AI SDK 用 `^` 的潜在波动**：`@anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.96.0`、`@openai/codex-sdk ^0.131.0`、`claude-agent-sdk ^0.3.144` 都是 0.x。caret 在 0.x 下只放行同 minor 的 patch，加上锁文件兜底，**复现性没问题**；风险只在有人跑 `pnpm update` 或非 frozen 安装时。务必保证 CI 用 `--frozen-lockfile`。

---

## 三、详细建议（按优先级）

**P0｜补环境契约（投入最小，收益最大）**
```jsonc
// package.json
"engines": { "node": ">=20.0.0" },
"packageManager": "pnpm@<你当前的版本>"   // 开 Corepack，团队 pnpm 版本一致
```
并在 CI/约定里统一 `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`，把"复现性"从隐性变显性。

**P1｜核 `react-syntax-highlighter` 类型错位**
确认 v16 的导入在 TS 下是否报缺类型/类型不符。若不符，三选一：等/找匹配 16 的 `@types`、用 `declare module` 局部补声明、或评估降回类型齐全的版本。这是当前唯一可能影响渲染层类型安全的实质问题。

**P2｜清理 Tailwind 4 的 PostCSS 链**
打开 `postcss.config.*`，若 `autoprefixer` 未被引用，从 devDeps 移除 autoprefixer（必要时连带审视 postcss 是否还需显式声明），减少与 Tailwind 4 内置能力的重复。

**P3｜把"为什么锁死"写进代码旁注**
在 `electron-store: 8.2.0` 与 `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk: 1.29.0` 旁加一行注释（或记进 README/CHANGELOG），说明"ESM-only 不可升 / 跨 minor 易 break"。否则半年后很可能被人"好心升级"踩回坑。

**P4｜可选优化**
- `typecheck` 现在是两次独立 `tsc -p`；既然已是 project references，可评估 `tsc -b --noEmit` 走增量，CI 上更快。
- 若后续多个 AI SDK 出现 zod/transitive 版本打架，再引入 `pnpm.overrides`——目前锁文件显示 `@anthropic-ai/sdk` 已对齐 `zod@4.3.6`，暂不需要。

---

**一句话总结**：架构分层、原生模块与打包处理、关键依赖的刻意锁版——这些**核心面做得相当规范、有内行味道**；短板集中在"环境契约缺失（engines/packageManager）"和"个别类型包版本错位"这类**工程卫生**层面，按 P0→P1 顺序补齐即可达到生产级规范。

需要我直接帮你改 `package.json`（加 engines/packageManager）、或去核 `react-syntax-highlighter` 的类型与 `postcss.config` 吗？
